abbreviations.definition: repeat the sequence of loops in brackets L times

rawInstruction: Gluing the eyes: I smeared the tips of the eyes with glue and inserted them in 10 rows from the beginning of the head, the distance between the eyes is 10 loops. We embroider eyebrows over the eyes.
summary: Glue eyes 10 rows from the head start with 10 loops between them, and embroider eyebrows.
title: Glue eyes and embroider eyebrows
